zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：震荡整理偏多
zh.content:
当前BTC/USDT维持窄幅震荡格局，价格围绕6万关口反复整理，多空动能暂时均衡，短线缺乏明确突破方向。市场观望情绪较浓。

技术指标方面，SMA20位于59802附近，价格略高于均线，短线结构偏多；MACD柱值为负但动能收敛，RSI缺失需结合后市确认。

支撑位关注59800与日内低59822附近，上方阻力集中60000及60028高点，区间收敛等待方向选择。短期波动加剧谨防假突破。

操作建议以区间交易为主，靠近59800一带分批低吸，60000上方谨慎追多，跌破支撑需及时止损观望。控制仓位风险保持灵活应对。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is currently consolidating around the 60,000 USD psychological level after a prolonged sideways phase. Price action remains compressed within a tight intraday range, suggesting market indecision rather than strong directional momentum. Despite minor gains, upside follow-through has been limited, indicating that bulls are struggling to establish a decisive breakout. Overall structure reflects a neutral-to-slightly bullish consolidation following recent stabilization above short-term averages.

Momentum indicators present a mixed but cautiously bearish bias in the very short term. The MACD reading at -42.52 suggests fading upside momentum and a potential continuation of corrective pressure unless a signal-line recovery develops. With RSI not provided, price behavior must be inferred from structure and moving averages. Trading slightly above the 20-period SMA near 59,802 indicates that buyers still defend key intraday equilibrium levels.

Immediate support is located near the 59,800–59,700 zone, closely aligned with the 20-period SMA and recent intraday lows around 59,822. A breakdown below this area could expose deeper support near 59,200. On the upside, resistance is concentrated at 60,000–60,030, a key psychological and liquidity zone. A sustained breakout above 60,030 would open the path toward 60,500 and potentially extend bullish momentum.

Short-term traders may consider range-bound strategies, buying near support while taking partial profits into resistance. Given the weak MACD momentum, aggressive long positions are not favored unless a confirmed breakout above 60,030 occurs with volume expansion. Conversely, a rejection at resistance could justify short-term downside scalps toward the 59,800 area. Risk management remains critical, with tight stops below key support to avoid breakout failures.
